message:
Add map_reduce combinator and other combinator improvements

- Add map_reduce combinator for parallel map with monoid-based reduction
  - MapReduce<T> marker type for N-way map-reduce operations
  - MapReduceResult/MapReduceError types with partial reduction support
  - map_reduce_outcomes, make_map_reduce_result, map_reduce_to_result helpers
  - reduce_successes for lenient partial aggregation
  - 23 comprehensive tests (asupersync-akx.8.3)

- Add circuit_breaker combinator for failure detection (in progress)
- Improvements to first_ok and pipeline combinators

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
